form_packet_signature: failure to complete, sign, and submit all forms 10,20, & 50 may render the bid or proposal non-responsive
participation plan: guidance for complying with good faith efforts outreach
solicited and dmi-utilized forms must be completed for all firms solicited and all firms utilized. other
text_preview:
Failure to Complete, Sign, and Submit all Forms 10,20, & 50 MAY render the Bid or Proposal Non-Responsive 
Participation
artifact_summary: Guidance document outlining ten requirements for contractors to solicit, document, and assist Small Local Business Enterprises (SLBEs) in compliance with Good Faith Efforts Outreach.
artifact_blurb: This section of the GFECP-DMI 50 Form provides detailed operational directives for contractors regarding Good Faith Efforts Outreach. It enumerates ten mandatory requirements specifically focused on the active solicitation, rigorous documentation, and strategic assistance of Small Local Business Enterprises (SLBEs) throughout the competitive bidding and subcontracting lifecycle.
